summary: Tested multi-language (ID/EN) support for Gimu Digital Hub frontend. All core language switching features are working correctly. Language toggle button present in navbar, text switches properly on landing page, products page, login/register pages. localStorage persistence confirmed. One minor bug found: footer product category links hardcoded in Indonesian.

ui_bugs.issue: Product category links in footer are hardcoded in Indonesian ('Video Kursus', 'Bank Soal') instead of using t() translation function. Should use t('cat_label_video'), t('cat_label_quiz') etc.

action_items: Fix Footer.js: Replace hardcoded 'Video Kursus' with t('cat_label_video'), 'Bank Soal' with t('cat_label_quiz'), 'Template' with t('cat_label_template'), 'E-Book' with t('cat_label_ebook'). Also consider translating 'Privacy Policy' and 'Terms of Service' links.
critical_code_review_comments: Footer.js lines 27-30: Product category links are hardcoded in Indonesian - not using t() translations. This breaks EN language experience for footer navigation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language support (ID/EN) is implemented and working. Key facts: (1) lang-toggle button has data-testid='lang-toggle', shows 'EN' when in ID mode and 'ID' when in EN mode; (2) default lang is 'id' (Indonesian); (3) localStorage key is 'gimu_lang'; (4) persistence across page reload works correctly; (5) All main pages (landing, products, login, register) translate correctly. Minor issue: footer product category links hardcoded in Indonesian.
